bugs_found.description: signNoZero<float> returns 0 for NaN, violates ne_zero.
negate<int16_t> not a global involution. negate(negate(-32767))=-32768.

correspondence_coverage: ALL 19 LEAN FILES: MathFunctions, AlphaFilter, SlewRate, Deadzone, Interpolate, WelfordMean, Lerp, Negate, WrapAngle, Expo, RingBuffer, MedianFilter, SuperExpo, ExpoDeadzone, InterpolateNXY, InterpolateN, Hysteresis, SignFromBoolSq (23 C++ targets total)
notes: set tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
norm_num tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
linarith NOT available, ring NOT available
split_ifs NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib - use by_cases
by_contra NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib - use Classical.byContradiction
push_neg NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
lemma keyword NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib (only in Mathlib). Use theorem instead.
Expo.lean is at ROOT namespace (no namespace wrapper) - constrainRat, expoRat, expo_* are all root-level names. open PX4.Expo does NOT work.
Deadzone.lean is in namespace PX4.Deadzone - use open PX4.Deadzone or fully-qualified PX4.Deadzone.X
Rat.lt_of_lt_of_le does NOT exist - use Std.lt_of_lt_of_le
Rat.le_of_lt works for le from lt
neg/div: Rat.neg_div does not exist. Use Rat.div_def + Rat.neg_mul + simp [Rat.sub_eq_add_neg, Rat.neg_add, Rat.neg_neg]
omega works for Nat.mod_lt and modular arithmetic
Unused theorem parameters: prefix with _ to suppress linter warning
RingBuffer actual theorem count is 24 (not 28 as previously reported in REPORT.md)
CI lean-ci.yml is healthy: lake update + caching + failure artifacts + GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
InterpolateNXY.lean uses namespace PX4.InterpolateNXY, imports FVSquad.Interpolate, opens PX4.Interpolate
ExpoDeadzone.lean uses expoDeadzone_* naming (NOT expodz_* from run35)
decide does NOT work for Rat comparisons involving 1/2 literal - use native_decide
private theorem works but private lemma does not (lemma unavailable without Mathlib)
Rat.lt_of_le_of_lt does NOT exist - use Std.lt_of_le_of_lt
InterpolateN.lean uses namespace PX4.InterpolateN, imports FVSquad.Interpolate, opens PX4.Interpolate
half: Rat = (1:Rat)/(2:Rat) as a private def - use native_decide to prove facts about it
Mathlib cache proxy blocks with 403; lake update works but lake build from source would take hours
CORRESPONDENCE.md now covers all 19 Lean files (23 C++ targets) - complete as of run49
LaTeX/pdflatex not available in CI (no sudo) - paper.tex written but PDF not compiled
Paper in formal-verification/paper/ uses ACM sigconf format (acmart.cls). Use latexmk locally.
signFromBool target: Bool->+-1, all 7 theorems by rcases Bool.eq_false_or_eq_true + simp/decide
sq target: sqRat uses case-split + Rat.mul_nonneg + Rat.neg_mul/mul_neg/neg_neg for nonneg; Rat.mul_eq_zero for iff-zero; calc+Rat.mul_assoc+mul_comm for multiplicativity
sqInt: Int.neg_mul_neg for even; case-split + Int.mul_nonneg + Int.neg_nonneg for nonneg
mul_self_nonneg/Rat.mul_self_nonneg/Int.mul_self_nonneg do NOT exist - use case split + Rat.mul_nonneg
Rat.mul_left_comm does NOT exist - use Rat.mul_assoc + Rat.mul_comm for rearrangement
ac_rfl does NOT work for Rat - rearrange manually via calc
native_decide works for concrete Rat values like (-5:Rat), (3/2:Rat) - prefer over decide for Rat
crc16 fold: List.foldl_append is key; UInt8/UInt16 types have modular semantics matching C uint8_t/uint16_t
Next priorities: (1) Crc16Fold.lean Phase 3-5 (foldl model, easy simp proof); (2) atmosphere_density Phase 2 informal spec; (3) compile PDF when LaTeX available
